stemHtml: What is the effect of exceeding M<sub>CRIT</sub> on the stick force stability of an aeroplane with swept-back wings without any form of stability augmentation?

options.a: A decrease, due to loss of lift in the wing root area.
options.b: No effect, because M<sub>CRIT</sub> is not relevant when considering stick force stability.
options.c: No effect, because stick force stability is independent of Mach number.
options.d: An increase, due to shock wave formation in the wing root area.
